# Serverless Compute Cost Predictability

The hardest part of serverless billing is forecasting a monthly bill when
workloads spike unpredictably. Pay-per-use is efficient at the margin but the
variance makes finance teams nervous, especially for agent-driven jobs that
fan out without a fixed schedule.

## Questions Answered
- Why is budgeting hard under pure consumption pricing?
- What makes spiky workloads expensive to forecast?

## Questions Raised
- Could a hybrid commit-plus-overage model tame the variance?
